mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stock_tail_trade_snapshot_v3 ( stock_code, trade_date, price_1400, price_1430, high_before_1430, low_before_1430, tail_amount_1400_1430, tail_volume_1400_1430, amount_before_1430, volume_before_1430, low_1435_1444, low_1445_1454, low_1455_1500, close_price, close_amount, high_0930_0935, high_0936_0940, high_0941_0944, price_0945, vwap_0930_0945, sell_amount_0930_0945, sell_volume_0930_0945, valid_flag, invalid_reason, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.stockCode}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.price1400}, #{item.price1430}, #{item.highBefore1430}, #{item.lowBefore1430}, #{item.tailAmount14001430}, #{item.tailVolume14001430}, #{item.amountBefore1430}, #{item.volumeBefore1430}, #{item.low14351444}, #{item.low14451454}, #{item.low14551500}, #{item.closePrice}, #{item.closeAmount}, #{item.high09300935}, #{item.high09360940}, #{item.high09410944}, #{item.price0945}, #{item.vwap09300945}, #{item.sellAmount09300945}, #{item.sellVolume09300945}, #{item.validFlag}, #{item.invalidReason}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE price_1400 = VALUES(price_1400), price_1430 = VALUES(price_1430), high_before_1430 = VALUES(high_before_1430), low_before_1430 = VALUES(low_before_1430), tail_amount_1400_1430 = VALUES(tail_amount_1400_1430), tail_volume_1400_1430 = VALUES(tail_volume_1400_1430), amount_before_1430 = VALUES(amount_before_1430), volume_before_1430 = VALUES(volume_before_1430), low_1435_1444 = VALUES(low_1435_1444), low_1445_1454 = VALUES(low_1445_1454), low_1455_1500 = VALUES(low_1455_1500), close_price = VALUES(close_price), close_amount = VALUES(close_amount), high_0930_0935 = VALUES(high_0930_0935), high_0936_0940 = VALUES(high_0936_0940), high_0941_0944 = VALUES(high_0941_0944), price_0945 = VALUES(price_0945), vwap_0930_0945 = VALUES(vwap_0930_0945), sell_amount_0930_0945 = VALUES(sell_amount_0930_0945), sell_volume_0930_0945 = VALUES(sell_volume_0930_0945), valid_flag = VALUES(valid_flag), invalid_reason = VALUES(invalid_reason), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
